name: Paris Brest
recipeInstructions:
See recipe for Pastry Cream.
In a large saucepan, bring water, butter, and salt to a boil.
Gradually add flour to the boiling mixture and stir vigorously until the dough forms a ball and pulls away from the sides of the pan.
Remove from heat. Gradually beat in eggs one at a time until incorporated and smooth.
Spoon the dough into a pastry bag fitted with a round nozzle.
Pipe circles on a buttered, lightly floured baking sheet, spacing them about 1 inch apart.
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Melt butter over low heat and brush over the shapes. Sprinkle with almonds.
Place in the oven and bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool on a rack.
When cooled, split horizontally. Fill bottom ring with pastry cream. Replace top ring and dust with powdered sugar.
